metadata.name: Missouri Business Search
metadata.description: Search Missouri Secretary of State business entity database by name, paginate ASP.NET Web Forms postback results, collapse previous names under parent entities

variables.name: searchTerm
variables.description: Business name to search (Starting With match)

variables.name: correlationId
variables.description: Trace correlation ID from calling client

variables.name: searchEntryUrl
variables.description: Missouri SOS business search page URL

variables.name: maxPages
variables.description: Maximum number of result pages to scrape (1051 results / 20 per page)

variables.name: results
variables.description: Accumulated search results across all pages

variables.name: truncated
variables.description: Whether results exceed the 1,051 display cap

variables.name: isLastPage
variables.description: Set to truthy when current page equals total pages (Telerik RadGrid pager)

actions.description: Load Missouri SOS business entity search page
Wait for Business Name textbox to render
Enter business name into search field
Click SEARCH button to submit ASP.NET postback form
Detect truncation warning when results exceed 1,051 display cap
Extract search results from Telerik RadGrid table (10-column rows), collapse previous-name rows into parent entity previousNames array, generate uniqueKey from entity ID in cell[0]
actions.javascript: () => { const normalize = (v) => (v || '').replace(/\s+/g, ' ').trim(); const table = document.querySelector('table.rgMasterTable'); if (!table) return JSON.stringify([]); const rows = Array.from(table.querySelectorAll('tbody tr')).filter(r => { const cells = r.querySelectorAll('td'); return cells.length === 10 && /^\d+$/.test(normalize(cells[0].textContent)); }); const entities = new Map(); const previousNames = new Map(); for (const row of rows) { const cells = Array.from(row.querySelectorAll('td')); const entityId = normalize(cells[0].textContent); const nameText = normalize(cells[3].textContent); const isPrevious = nameText.includes('(previous name)'); if (isPrevious) { const prevName = nameText.replace(/\s*\(previous name\)\s*/i, '').trim(); if (!previousNames.has(entityId)) previousNames.set(entityId, []); previousNames.get(entityId).push(prevName); } else { const charterNo = normalize(cells[4].textContent); const entityType = normalize(cells[5].textContent); const status = normalize(cells[6].textContent); const created = normalize(cells[8].textContent) || null; const agent = normalize(cells[9].textContent) || null; const keyObj = { state: 'US-MO', params: { entityId: entityId } }; const keyJson = JSON.stringify(keyObj); const uniqueKey = btoa(keyJson).replace(/\+/g, '-').replace(/\//g, '_').replace(/=+$/, ''); entities.set(entityId, { name: normalize(cells[2].textContent), identifier: charterNo, entityType: entityType, status: status, formationDate: created, registeredAgentName: agent, previousNames: [], uniqueKey: uniqueKey, state: 'MO' }); } } for (const [id, names] of previousNames) { if (entities.has(id)) { entities.get(id).previousNames = names; } } return JSON.stringify(Array.from(entities.values())); }

actions.description: Check if first page is also the last page (single-page result set)
actions.javascript: () => { const m = document.body.innerText.match(/Page\s+(\d+)\s+of\s+(\d+)/); if (!m) return 'true'; return (m[1] === m[2]) ? 'true' : ''; }

actions.description: Paginate through remaining result pages via ASP.NET postback pager buttons
Check if current page is the last page by parsing Telerik RadGrid pager text 'Page X of Y'
Extract results from current page (same Telerik RadGrid logic as initial extraction)
actions.javascript: () => { const normalize = (v) => (v || '').replace(/\s+/g, ' ').trim(); const table = document.querySelector('table.rgMasterTable'); if (!table) return JSON.stringify([]); const rows = Array.from(table.querySelectorAll('tbody tr')).filter(r => { const cells = r.querySelectorAll('td'); return cells.length === 10 && /^\d+$/.test(normalize(cells[0].textContent)); }); const entities = new Map(); const previousNames = new Map(); for (const row of rows) { const cells = Array.from(row.querySelectorAll('td')); const entityId = normalize(cells[0].textContent); const nameText = normalize(cells[3].textContent); const isPrevious = nameText.includes('(previous name)'); if (isPrevious) { const prevName = nameText.replace(/\s*\(previous name\)\s*/i, '').trim(); if (!previousNames.has(entityId)) previousNames.set(entityId, []); previousNames.get(entityId).push(prevName); } else { const charterNo = normalize(cells[4].textContent); const entityType = normalize(cells[5].textContent); const status = normalize(cells[6].textContent); const created = normalize(cells[8].textContent) || null; const agent = normalize(cells[9].textContent) || null; const keyObj = { state: 'US-MO', params: { entityId: entityId } }; const keyJson = JSON.stringify(keyObj); const uniqueKey = btoa(keyJson).replace(/\+/g, '-').replace(/\//g, '_').replace(/=+$/, ''); entities.set(entityId, { name: normalize(cells[2].textContent), identifier: charterNo, entityType: entityType, status: status, formationDate: created, registeredAgentName: agent, previousNames: [], uniqueKey: uniqueKey, state: 'MO' }); } } for (const [id, names] of previousNames) { if (entities.has(id)) { entities.get(id).previousNames = names; } } return JSON.stringify(Array.from(entities.values())); }
